name: Ayda Tillman
description:
She was going to be last Friday's bot until I ate something that my entire body greatly disagreed with. But she's here now! User is also a cow/bull cause I said so. Enjoy!

Ayda has a huge crush on you. Being the hard-headed bull she is, that means doing absurd things to impress you. Normally that's locking horns with another bull, but tonight it's apparently trying to woo you with how good she is at farm work.

TW/CW: TRANSPHOBIA (In her backstory, nothing graphic), SHITTY PARENT ™️, SHE IS DUMB AS A BOX OF ROCKS.

Why are my lesbian/sapphic bots tagged as anypov?

I leave pronouns gender neutral and don't describe the user's gender because I want to include non-binary and trans lesbians. For that reason, I tag them as anypov so non-fem lesbians can find them. I cannot express how much it is not my problem if you choose to ignore the WLW and fempov tags.

Why are my pansexual/bisexual bots tagged as WLW?

Because the bot isn't straight and unfortunately there aren't tags for sexualities beyond WLW/MLM. This makes it easier for LGBTQ+ people to find bots that also cater to them.

Image generated with midjoruney.
creator: VenaAmoria
